channel.title: Abouts on 1st Anytown Scouts
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on 1st Anytown Scouts

item.title: Governance
item.description: Every parent and carer of a member is welcome at the AGM, where the Trustee Board reports on the year, presents the accounts, and stands for re-election. We’d genuinely welcome more hands on the board — particularly anyone with finance, fundraising or premises experience. If that might be you, have a word with any of the trustees listed above.

item.title: Our history
item.description: We started in 1974 with six children and two borrowed trestle tables. A pair of parents who had run Scout sections back in the UK found themselves overseas, far from the nearest Group, and decided their own children — and their friends — shouldn’t miss out. The first meetings ran in a villa majlis; within a few years we had affiliated to British Scouting Overseas and were running the same programme, and working towards the same awards, as Groups at home.
